meaning: n.[动]树眼睛蛇,曼巴(非洲有毒树蛇)
examples: The mamba will strike not once, but repeatedly, injecting large amounts of potent neuro- and cardiotoxin with each strike.
Creep up to a sleeping mamba, tweak it by the tail.
This is an aka mamba, a moonfish, caught off the coast not far from Tokyo.
Dr Lingueglia said it was "really surprising" that black mamba venom would contain such a powerful painkiller.
